name: mouse_low_complexity
description: Low-complexity mouse intervals: homopolymer A/T tracts, short di- and tri-nucleotide microsatellites, AT-rich isochore valleys. Identified by low Shannon 5-mer entropy and biased GC. Common in pericentromeric flanks and in introns of large genes. Distinct from tandem_repeat in that period is too short to be assigned reliably (often <6 bp) or absent.
